name: desk_lamp_v1
description: Desk lamp. Level 3 furniture. Components: flat base (cylinder) + vertical pole (cylinder) + horizontal arm (cylinder, rotation_euler Z=90) + conical shade (cone, tip-up) + bulb (sphere). Origin at floor (y=0 = base bottom).

children.name: base
children.comment: Flat circular base. Cylinder center at y=base_h/2 so bottom touches y=0.

children.name: pole
children.comment: Vertical pole. Bottom sits on top of base (y=base_h), center at y=base_h+pole_h/2.

children.name: arm
children.comment: Horizontal arm along +X axis. Default cylinder is Y-axis; rotation_euler [0,-90,0] rotates Y->X (yaw=-90 in this engine's Euler convention). Center at [arm_len/2, pole_top, 0] so arm spans x=[0, arm_len].

children.name: shade
children.comment: Cone shade: tip at +Y (top), opening at -Y (bottom). Tip positioned at arm end (x=arm_len, y=pole_top). Center = tip_y - shade_h/2 = base_h+pole_h - shade_h/2.

children.name: bulb
children.comment: Light bulb sphere inside the shade, centered at shade midpoint.
